name: SmartRecruiters Talent Acquisition API
what_it_does: SmartRecruiters REST API for enterprise talent acquisition platform. Enables AI agents to query job postings, retrieve candidate data, access application status, manage interview workflows, and integrate recruiting data into HR and reporting workflows. SmartRecruiters is a leading ATS for enterprise talent acquisition teams.
use_cases: Querying job posting status and candidate pipeline from talent analytics agents
Retrieving application and interview stage data from recruiting workflow agents
Accessing hiring team activity and time-to-fill metrics from HR reporting agents
Integrating candidate data with HRIS and onboarding systems from HR automation agents
not_for: Mass automated candidate outreach without recruiter oversight
best_when: An enterprise talent acquisition team using SmartRecruiters wants AI agents to surface pipeline metrics, track candidate progress, and integrate recruiting data into HR analytics and HRIS workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Candidate data including applications, resumes, and interview feedback is highly sensitive. Automated candidate screening without human oversight risks bias and legal exposure.

auth.notes: SmartRecruiters supports API key (X-SmartToken) and OAuth 2.0. OAuth recommended for user-level integrations. Developer portal for app registration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Enterprise contract required; SmartStart free tier exists for small teams
pricing.notes: Enterprise ATS with free SmartStart for small teams. API access on paid plans.

performance.rate_limits: SmartRecruiters API: rate limits apply; documented in API reference

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Candidate PII including resumes, applications, and interview notes is highly sensitive
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
Automated candidate screening without human oversight risks bias and legal exposure (EEOC)
Candidate data requires GDPR right-to-erasure compliance — design accordingly
EU data residency available — verify data residency for EU candidate data
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Candidate PII, resumes, and interview feedback. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EEOC compliance for automated screening. EU data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Candidate PII and hiring data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. EEOC considerations for screening automation. EU data residency.
